category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gvp as a Go versioning packager; official repository URL in source_facts points to the project source.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gvp; source_facts.repo identifies the official repository as pote/gvp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best available project documentation surface; source_facts.homepage is the same repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/pote/gvp, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Go versioning packager; related official Go package context describes gvp as providing dependency isolation for Go projects.
